channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: West Bengal Elections Highlight Concerns About Voter Exclusions and Electoral Fairness
item.description: As West Bengal heads to the polls, concerns about the integrity of elections have become pronounced. The 2021 V-Dem Institute report labelled India as an 'electoral autocracy', highlighting significan...

item.title: Boko Haram Attacks Farmers and Firewood Sellers in Borno, 18 Confirmed Dead
item.description: Boko Haram insurgents have attacked farmers and firewood sellers in Gwoza, Borno State, killing 18 people. The attack occurred on Thursday when the victims were clearing their farmlands in preparation...

item.title: ADC Hails Tony Nwoye As New Senate Minority Whip, Shows Confidence in Party
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don give Tony Nwoye big congrats as e don become the Senate Minority Whip. According to the National Publicity Secretary, Bolaji Abdullahi, dis promotion na clear...

item.title: Nokia raises AI business growth targets after strong earnings report
item.description: Nokia has raised its growth targets for its AI business after surpassing market expectations for its first-quarter earnings. The Finnish company reported a 54% increase in comparable operating profit,...

item.title: Beige and white outfits emerge as a visible show of support for TVK during Tamil Nadu polling
item.description: During the Tamil Nadu polling day, a noticeable visual trend emerged across several booths, particularly in Chennai and other parts of the state. Many voters, both men and women, arrived dressed in wh...

item.title: Toronto Raptors defeat Cleveland Cavaliers 126-104 in Game 3 with standout performances from Barnes and Barrett
item.description: The Toronto Raptors secured a decisive 126-104 victory over the Cleveland Cavaliers in Game 3 of their first-round NBA playoff series, though Cleveland still leads the series 2-1. Scottie Barnes deliv...

item.title: Bride Receives Toyota Car Gift from Father on Wedding Day
item.description: On her wedding day, Jemmy experienced one of the most emotional moments of her life when her father surprised her with a brand-new Toyota car. The lavish gift, adorned with a bright red ribbon, left h...

item.title: Trump directs US Navy to target Iranian vessels deploying mines in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US President Donald Trump has instructed the US Navy to 'shoot to kill' any Iranian vessels laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz. This order comes amid ongoing tensions as Iran continues to assert con...

item.title: Kasarani Entrepreneur Closes Hotel After Losing KSh 1 Million; Updates on Tragic Death of Anita Mugweru
item.description: A young man from Kasarani closed down his hotel business just a year after opening it, despite having invested over KSh 1 million, citing a harsh business environment. He shared an emotional video as ...

item.title: Reassessing the Long-Term Health and Policy Implications of the Chornobyl Disaster
item.description: The article reflects on the 40th anniversary of the Chornobyl nuclear disaster, arguing that public discussion has long focused on the wrong question—how many people died—while overlooking the broader...

item.title: Obinna urges Njugush and Wakavinye to consider reconciliation after their separation
item.description: Media personality Oga Obinna has shared his thoughts on the widely discussed breakup between Kenyan comedian Timothy Kimani, also known as Njugush, and his wife Celestine Ndinda, popularly called Waka...

item.title: Nine News retracts false meteor story after expert identifies airplane contrail
item.description: Nine News broadcast a video on the Today show claiming a meteor shower lit up Melbourne's sky, attributing it to the Lyrid meteor shower visible in Victoria until 25 April. The footage, picked up from...

item.title: Amit Shah claims TMC's era of corruption and hooliganism over after record Bengal poll turnout
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah has said the 'sun of the TMC’s corruption and hooliganism has set' after the first phase of assembly polling in West Bengal recorded the highest-ever voter turnout in the...

item.title: Intel Expects Higher-Than-Expected Revenue Driven by AI Server Chip Demand
item.description: Intel Corporation has projected second-quarter revenue that exceeds Wall Street expectations, reflecting strong demand for its server chips used in artificial-intelligence data centres. Shares of Inte...

item.title: India and Japan sign MoU to integrate construction data with urban platforms for AI-enabled smart cities
item.description: In a significant step towards building AI-ready smart cities, a Japanese construction technology firm ONESTRUCTION Inc. and DataKaveri Systems, the commercial arm of Indian Institute of Science Bengal...

item.title: Giant Octopus Species Once Roamed B.C. Waters, Study Reveals
item.description: Fossils found in B.C. and Japan suggest that octopuses as large as modern whales prowled the seas during the Age of Dinosaurs. One species, *Nanaimotethis haggarti*, may have been among the largest in...

item.title: Matt Keogh discusses Anzac Day, veterans’ reforms and defence spending amid Roberts-Smith controversy
item.description: In this episode of the Australian Politics podcast, Matt Keogh, the minister for veterans’ affairs and defence personnel, speaks ahead of his trip to Papua New Guinea for Anzac Day commemorations. The...

item.title: Melbourne nightclub arsons and violence linked to suspected underworld extortion plot
item.description: Nightlife businesses and promoters in Melbourne are being targeted in a wave of arson attacks, shootings and attempted kidnappings that police believe may be part of an organised crime extortion schem...

item.title: How One Nation Shapes Australian Policy Without Holding Power
item.description: Despite never forming government or serving as the official opposition, Australia’s One Nation party has exerted a notable influence on national policy debates for nearly three decades. The article ex...

item.title: Apple Fixes Bug That Caused Push Notifications to Store Signal Data
item.description: Apple recently addressed a significant privacy concern affecting users of the encrypted messaging app Signal. A bug in iOS was causing push notifications related to Signal messages to be stored on dev...
